variables.description: Did the patient receive any blood transfusions today during or after surgery

variables.description: Data Management Coordinating Center Internal Identifier

variables.description: Did the patient receive any FFP or cryoprecipitate transfusions today during or after surgery

variables.description: What was the indication for reoperation

variables.description: IndicationsForTherap: Acute coronary syndrome or heart attack

variables.description: IndicationsForTherap: Acute thromboembolic stroke or TIA

variables.description: Indications for therapeutic anticoagulation Other Specify

variables.name: IndForTherap_DVT_PE_VBClot
variables.description: IndicationsForTherap: Suspected or proven DVT, PE or other venous blood clot

variables.name: OperatingRoomToday
variables.description: Did the patient go back to the operating room today

variables.name: PltTransfusionsToday
variables.description: Did the patient receive any platelet transfusions today during or after surgery

variables.name: SequentialCompressionDevice
variables.description: Did the patient wear a sequential compression device at any point today

variables.description: Did the patient receive therapeutic anticoagulation today

variables.description: Time restarted if restarted on the same day it was stopped

variables.description: Total dose of UFH during surgery

variables.description: Did the patient have an inferior vena cava filter placed today

variables.description: Computed Age (in days) at visit (where DOB provided)

Code meanings and truncated variable descriptions are provided as submitted. For questions regarding the data, please contact the study investigators.

variables.name: ArterialThromboembolismEver
variables.description: Has the patient ever had arterial thromboembolism of a limb or internal organ

variables.name: BloodClotDx
variables.description: Has the patient ever been diagnosed with venous thrombosis other than in a superficial vein

variables.name: ClotCausingHemodialysisGra
variables.description: Has the patient ever suffered a clot in his/her hemodialysis graft or fistula severe enough to require a new graft or fistula or to require an intervention

variables.name: DMCC_record_id
variables.description: Data Management Coordinating Center Internal Identifier

variables.name: DxHIT
variables.description: Has the patient ever been diagnosed with HIT heparininduced thrombocytopenia

variables.name: DxWithHeartAttack
variables.description: Has the patient ever been diagnosed with a heart attack

variables.name: DxWithStrokeorTIA
variables.description: Has the patient ever been diagnosed with a stroke arterial thromboembolic stroke or TIA ministroke

variables.name: HadCatheter
variables.description: Has the patient ever had a central line or other semi permanent indwelling line

variables.name: HeparinDuringDialysis
variables.description: Does the patient receive heparin during dialysis

variables.name: HeparinForHIT
variables.description: Did the patient ever receive heparin or LMWH after this diagnosis was confirmed

variables.name: HighCholesterol
variables.description: Has the patient ever had hyperlipidemia or hypercholesterolemia

variables.name: HormoneReplOrOralContraceptive
variables.description: Does the patient currently within the past 30 days use hormone replacement or oral contraceptive pills

variables.name: HowManyDays
variables.description: For how many days did they receive the heparin or LMWH most recent exposure only

variables.name: KidneyFailure
variables.description: Does the patient have renal insufficiency or failure now or ever

variables.name: LastPreOpHemodialysisVisit
variables.description: When is the last dialysis scheduled to occur prior to bypass surgery

variables.name: LengthOfTimeSmoking
variables.description: How long did the patient smoke

variables.name: Miscarriage
variables.description: Has the patient ever had a miscarriage

variables.name: MoreThan30BYPSurgWI100Days
variables.description: More than 30 days before bypass surgery but within 100 days of surgery

variables.name: MoreThan30BYPSurgWI100DaysOther
variables.description: More than 30 days before bypass surgery but within 100 days of surgery If yes Other

variables.name: PlacentalInfarction
variables.description: Has the patient ever been diagnosed with placental infarction during pregnancy or during the birth of her children

variables.name: ProphylacticAnticoag
variables.description: During the past 100 days prior to surgery has the patient received any prophylactic anticoagulation

variables.name: Race_AmericanIndianorAKNative
variables.description: Race: American Indian or Alaska Native

variables.name: Race_NativeHIorOtherPacific
variables.description: Race: Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander

variables.name: ReceivedCardiacCath
variables.description: Has the patient ever undergone cardiac catheterizationeg coronary angiography right or left heart catheterization electrophysiology study

variables.name: ReceivedOpenHeartSurg
variables.description: Has the patient ever had open heart surgery before

variables.name: RecentCongestiveHeartFailure
variables.description: Has the patient had congestive heart failure within the past year

variables.name: RxForHIT
variables.description: Did the patient ever receive a direct thrombin inhibitor eg argatroban lepirudin or fondaparinux to treat HIT

variables.name: SevereClotInCatheterLine
variables.description: Has the patient ever suffered a clot in your line severe enough to require use of an anticoagulant removal of the catheter or placement of a new catheter

variables.name: SmokingPacksPerDay
variables.description: How many packs of cigarettes did the patient smoke on a usual day

variables.name: TherapDoseHepar_Between30to
variables.description: TherapeuticDoseHepar: Between 30 to 100 days prior to planned surgery

variables.name: TherapDoseHepar_Within30day
variables.description: TherapeuticDoseHepar: Within 30 days of planned surgery

variables.name: TherapDoseHeparin
variables.description: During the past 100 days prior to surgery did the patient receive therapeutic dose intravenous unfractionated heparin Excluding hemodialysis

variables.name: TherapDoseLMWH
variables.description: During the past 100 days prior to surgery did the patient receive therapeutic dose LMWH

variables.name: TherapDoseLMWHW_Btwn30to100
variables.description: TherapeuticDoseLMWHW: Between 30 to 100 days prior to planned surgery

variables.name: TherapDoseLMWHW_Within30day
variables.description: TherapeuticDoseLMWHW: Within 30 days of planned surgery

variables.name: UsingWarfarin
variables.description: Has the patient been using warfarin Coumadin within the last 30 days preop

variables.name: Within30DaysBYPSurgYesOthr
variables.description: Within 30 days of bypass surgery If yes other

variables.name: visit_age
variables.description: Computed Age (in days) at visit (where DOB provided)

Subject ID and consent group of participants with or without thromboembolic events and involved in the "The Incidence of Thromboembolic Events in Patients with Antibodies to Heparin-PF4 after Cardiac Bypass" project.
